response.original_title: Viskningar och Rop: En Film om Hur en Film Blir Till
response.overview: The behind-the-scenes documentary for Ingmar Bergman's 1972 masterpiece Cries and Whispersdirected by Bergman’s long-time collaborator, script girl Katinka Farago, it was shot on the set at Taxinge-Näsby Castle in Sweden. The documentary features a narration by Bergman scholar Peter Cowie
response.title: Viskningar och Rop: En Film om Hur en Film Blir Till
